channel.title: Jing Yanrong — Industrial Heat Pump Articles
channel.description: Weekly industry briefings and engineering insights by Jing Yanrong

item.title: Week 29 2026 Refrigeration & Heat Pump Industry Briefing / 2026年第29周制冷与热泵行业简报
item.description: Daikin NEXIO Max R32 rooftop HP (NA); AHRI May shipments +6.7%; France Qlima R290 monobloc recall (install height); MHI 10 MW data-centre chiller; China 1 Jul cluster week three; EPA TT final rule ~8 days to 27 Jul

item.title: Week 28 2026 Refrigeration & Heat Pump Industry Briefing / 2026年第28周制冷与热泵行业简报
item.description: LG 7/8 108°C industrial heat pump at Ajin P&P; Haier/Swegon/Daikin R290 launches 7/8–10; Mitsubishi UK high-temp policy white paper 7/10; China 1 Jul cluster week two; EPA TT final rule ~15 days to 27 Jul

item.title: Week 27 2026 Refrigeration & Heat Pump Industry Briefing / 2026年第27周制冷与热泵行业简报
item.description: China 1 Jul ODS cluster enters first enforcement week; Supreme Court upholds AIM Act cap-and-trade (22 Jun); HARDI/ACCA/PHCC sue EPA over commercial refrigeration GWP extensions (25 Jun); Systemair Geniox HP DFN R290 AHU (1 Jul); LG Therma V R290 monobloc in Europe

item.title: Week 26 2026 Refrigeration & Heat Pump Industry Briefing / 2026年第26周制冷与热泵行业简报
item.description: Intersolar Europe closes with hybrid PV–storage–heat focus (23–25 Jun); EcoFlow Munich launch: OASIS 3.0 & PowerHeat R290 (22 Jun); World Refrigeration Day Cool Intelligence (26 Jun); China 1 Jul regulatory cluster three-day countdown; MEE 2027 ODS/HFC quota draft still in comment

item.title: Week 25 2026 Refrigeration & Heat Pump Industry Briefing / 2026年第25周制冷与热泵行业简报
item.description: AIM Act CEO sentencing in R-410A import case (17 Jun); HCFC-141b spray ban ten-day countdown (1 Jul); Intersolar Europe opens 23 Jun with GoodWe & Differ Power; EPA Technology Transitions reconsideration commentary (mid-Jun); ASHRAE announces WRD 2026 Cool Intelligence theme (18 Jun)

item.title: Week 24 2026 Refrigeration & Heat Pump Industry Briefing / 2026年第24周制冷与热泵行业简报
item.description: IRN 2026 closes with ammonia vs CO₂ TCO debate (10–11 Jun); MEE 2027 ODS/HFC quota draft zero growth (10 Jun); IEA: heat pumps competitive in 16 EU countries (12 Jun); GoodWe PV-driven heat pumps at SNEC (11 Jun); Differ Power 9-in-1 R290 hub preview (12 Jun)

item.title: Week 23 2026 Refrigeration & Heat Pump Industry Briefing / 2026年第23周制冷与热泵行业简报
item.description: China FAS 2026/550 label rules enter first enforcement week (1 Jun); US DOE ends HEEHR/HOMES fuel-switching rebates (29 May); Danfoss €10M Reyrieux expansion at Choose France (1 Jun); HFC quota tight balance (4 Jun); AHRI CEO Yurek to retire 2027 (4 Jun)

item.title: Week 22 2026 Refrigeration & Heat Pump Industry Briefing / 2026年第22周制冷与热泵行业简报
item.description: 15th IEA HPC Vienna closes with 800+ delegates; EHPA re-elects Crombez & Rittinger Award; China FAS 2026/550 in force 1 Jun; US EPA relaxes AIM Act HFC transitions (26 May); Singapore NEA GWP≤150 from Jul 2027

item.title: Week 21 2026 Refrigeration & Heat Pump Industry Briefing / 2026年第21周制冷与热泵行业简报
item.description: EU IF25 Heat Auction ~€400M awards; EHPA Q1 2026 Europe heat-pump rebound; China energy-label catalog 2026 from 1 Jun; Vienna IEA HPC opens 26 May; site standards quick reference updated 22 May

item.title: Beyond the Hype: The Real Moat is Extreme Testing (-40°C to +300°C) / 超越炒作：真正的护城河是极端测试 (-40°C 至 +300°C)
item.description: Claim: Everyone claims 160°C capability, but few can prove it. Reality: The future belongs to those who build CNAS-level infrastructure to verify R744/Steam systems under extreme load boundaries. Prin

item.title: Large Screw Compressor Seizure: Not "Oil Starvation", but "Deadly Stacking of Tolerance & Thermal Deformation" / 大型螺杆机抱死真相：不是"缺油"，是"公差与热变形的死亡叠加"
item.description: Misconception: Normal oil level (60%+) ≠ effective lubrication. Simply replacing bearings cannot solve "critical friction". Truth: Deep disassembly revealed that a certain series of heavy-duty models

item.title: 5 Site Visits to Solve a "Mystery" Seizure: The -45°C Liquid Trap / 5次现场排查：终结 -45°C 液击"悬案"
item.description: Initial Diagnosis: Multiple large compressors seized and were initially blamed on manufacturing defects. Root Cause: After 5 site inspections, I traced the root cause not to the machine, but to the sy
